versionSemantics.contractVersion: Version of this JSON document shape and interpretation; increment for an incompatible serialization or semantic change.
versionSemantics.applicationContractVersion: Version of the externally observable updater ownership, workflow, and safety guarantees; increment when a consumer must change integration behavior.
versionSemantics.deviceContractVersion: Version of physical CDC admission, preflight, DFU write, and post-write verification assumptions and guarantees; increment when supported device behavior changes incompatibly.
versionSemantics.releaseVersioning: OEM firmware releases are independently versioned immutable manifests; changing only the selected OEM release does not increment the three contract versions.

usbOwnership.atomizerOperationalSession: Atomizer exclusively owns CDC analyzer/generator operation outside a firmware-update session.
usbOwnership.flasherUpdateSession: TinySA Flasher exclusively owns CDC discovery/preflight, DFU admission/write, and CDC post-write verification for the complete firmware-update session.
usbOwnership.mutualExclusion: Atomizer and TinySA Flasher must never access the same physical device simultaneously; close or disconnect Atomizer before starting an update session.

targetSelection.oem: The canonical immutable OEM release remains the default target and is fetched over an untrusted transport then admitted by exact size and SHA-256.
targetSelection.localCustom: A native-main file picker may admit a manifest-v1 ZS407 build and adjacent BIN into owner-only content-addressed storage after strict provenance, vector, embedded identity, size, and SHA-256 validation.
targetSelection.rendererPathPolicy: The renderer can request native target selection but cannot supply or observe a filesystem path.
targetSelection.targetChangePolicy: A target cannot change after preparation; a recovered prepared custom target must be rebound from its deterministic app-owned paths before write.
targetSelection.customQualificationProof: qualificationEvidenceSha256 is required exactly for qualified local-custom targets and forbidden for unqualified targets; native confirmation displays the custom manifest SHA-256.
targetSelection.customObservationPolicy: Ordinary CDC observation of matching custom version/revision labels cannot prove exact target bytes or provenance and remains custom-current/install-custom; only a just-completed durable write transaction may retain exact-target completion evidence.
targetSelection.descriptorWriteBoundary: The write path opens and verifies one regular-file descriptor, asserts that same open file description is stable immediately before spawn, and inherits it into dfu-util without resolving a firmware pathname.

externalTrustBoundaries.dfuUtil: Externally installed executable discovered by explicit TINYSA_DFU_UTIL or bounded PATH search; version output must identify 0.11, but the binary is not bundled or cryptographically pinned by this application.
externalTrustBoundaries.oemHttpHost: OEM artifact transport is untrusted; admission is exact byte length plus pinned SHA-256.
externalTrustBoundaries.localManifestAndBinary: Operator-selected files are untrusted; native main opens without following symlinks, requires current-user ownership and non-group/world-writable metadata, validates strict manifest and binary structure, then copies create-once into owner-only content-addressed storage.
